## Root Cause Summary

Summary:

========

System is granting license 2 to the cores when running AVX512 heavy WL but ratio resolved is from license 1.

Impact:

========

Having higher than expected ratios for AVX WL.

Details:

========

REPLACE  with failure and triage details.

==> System configuration: JF53NOR09BN0304 / 32 cores - 16DCM / 12 Channels, Micron 128Gb 2Rx4 8000

==> QDF: Q7YL 

==> BIOS/Patch/IFWI/BKC/CI Versions: OKSDCRB1.86B.2704.D08.2509060053

==> Reproducibility: Always

==> Lightswitch discover

### Forum Notes
[25ww40.3]

The issue is where AVX512 workloads are not receiving the expected license 3, resulting in higher-than-expected turbo frequencies

Simeon K reported that AVX512 workloads are being granted top turbo frequencies instead of the expected license 3, with similar behavior observed workloads but not yet tested for AMX.

Vidar rejected this sighting and instructing to continue with pre-sighting work.
